title: Snow Pink ( CPvP )
description:
This is my ( drl3x2015's ) private pack!! Which is now being released to the public.

This pack is for cpvp, sword, or whatever gamemode you want to play, as long as its 1.16+ . 

Also, Please do not steal/copy any textures!
body:
### This pack is mainly a Crystal PvP Pack ( CPvP ) 

**However, it could be used for sword/axe if wanted. This pack was also made to satisfy the pleasures and make the game seem/look more vibrant. This is to maximise your gameplay.**

```
This pack can also help you increase your tier by making things more pleasant to the eyes and making them more distinguishable.
```
